message:
✨ kc-agent: add /nvidia-operators endpoint (#10393)

Add endpoint to detect NVIDIA GPU operator installations across
managed clusters. Scans for GPU Operator, device plugin, feature
discovery, and Network Operator resources.

Fixes #10389

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
